title: Slow Paced
description: A (kinda) Vanilla+ modpack, subtly enhances every aspect of the game.
body:
# Slow Paced
If you're looking for a **Vanilla+** experience with a little bit more fun stuff, a modpack that doesn't constantly crash, which doesn't have a ton of incompatibilities or where the mods don't go well together, you've come to the right place! My new modpack improves a ton of aspects of the base game in a subtle and smooth way, configured to both perfection and balance. It contains a lot of mods which get rid of bugs, improve game mechanics and make playing the game much more pleasant.

**THIS MODPACK IS NOT SUITED FOR MULTIPLAYER OR CREATIVE YET**



<details>
<summary>Notable mods</summary>

- **World**: Tectonic, Tax' Structure Architect, Geophilic Reforged, Spelunkery, Immersive Weathering
- **Items & blocks**: [Let's Do] Series mods, Small Ships, Comforts, Artifacts, Better Archeology, Immersive Aircaft + Armors, Supplementaries + Amendmends, Endorium, HT's Treechop, Naturalist, Sophisticated Storage + Backpacks
- **Mechanics**: Village Workers, Gravestone Mod, Spice of Life: Apple Pie Edition, Reforged (Tiered), Item Physic Lite
- **Performance**: Embeddium + Oculus
- **GUI**: JEI, Jade, Legendary Tooltips, Map Atlases
- **Misc**: a TON of Serilum's and Fuzs's mods
</details>


<details>
<summary>Datapacks & Resource packs</summary>

- Vanilla Tweaks [https://vanillatweaks.net/]
- Enchant icons colorless
- Fancy crops
</details>
